text: Mbɔ na ka bɛta m ba Jeekɔb kutɔ nɛ b kaŋɛ mo le: “An yɔ fo da Isɔɔ kutɔ, amoso e ta basa alfa ana a shɛr fo to.”
translated: And when they came to Jacob's well, they said to him: “If you are the one who is called Jesus, then tell us, what is it that you want to do for us.”

ref: attacked King Bera of Sodom, King Birsha of Gomorrah, King Shinab of Admah, King Shemeber of Zeboiim, and the king of Bela, a city also known as Zoar.
text: Sodɔm be ewura Bɛra nɛ Gomɔra be ewura Birsha nɛ Adnab be ewura Shinab nɛ Zeboyim be ewura Shemeber nɛ Bela nɛ baa tre Zowar na be ewura na.
translated: The border of Sodom was to the east of Bera and the border of Gomorrah was to the east of Birsha and the border of Admah was to the east of Shanim and the border of Zeboiim was to the east of Shemeber and Bela and all of them were near the valley of Siddim

ref: Then God put these lights in the sky to shine on the earth,
text: Ndoŋ nna nɛ Ebɔrɛ shin nɛ amo kikɛ wɔ awɔlpa to a nyaŋɛ a yuu kasawule so
translated: The elephant and the hyena went to the farm and saw that the yam was ripe and ready to be harvested
